sql.where:
G.PRJ_ID = #{prjId}
AND U.NAME LIKE '%' || #{memberName} || '%'
AND G.NAME LIKE '%' || #{grpName} || '%'
AND TRUNC(M.PRJ_START_DATE) >= TO_DATE(#{prjStartFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(M.PRJ_START_DATE) <= TO_DATE(#{prjStartTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

mapper.select:
SELECT M.USER_ID AS userId, M.GRP_ID AS grpId, U.NAME AS userName, U.TEL AS tel, U.EMAIL AS email, G.NAME AS grpName, TO_CHAR(M.PRJ_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS prjStartDate FROM USERS U JOIN MEMBER M ON U.ID = M.USER_ID JOIN GRP G ON M.GRP_ID = G.ID
ORDER BY M.USER_ID
